expectations.text: Before writing any file, the skill asks at least 2 intake questions covering audience and either goal or length
expectations.evidence: found INTAKE NOTE / assumptions / open questions block
expectations.name: asks_intake_questions_before_drafting

expectations.text: A .txt file is created under docs/brainstorms/ with YYYY-MM-DD- prefix
expectations.name: produces_brainstorm_txt_file

expectations.text: Brainstorm file contains a HEADER box at the top with Audience, Goal, Style, Format, Date lines
expectations.name: file_has_header_box

expectations.text: Brainstorm file contains a NARRATIVE ARC section with a story spine listing one question per slide
expectations.name: file_has_narrative_arc_section

expectations.text: Brainstorm file contains at least 3 slide sections, each with an ASCII frame drawn with box characters
expectations.evidence: detected 8 SLIDE blocks; box chars present=True
expectations.name: file_has_per_slide_ascii_frames

expectations.text: Skill does NOT produce a .pptx, .html, or .pdf file
expectations.name: refuses_to_build_actual_deck
